ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bird_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird species */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family the species belongs to */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genus the species belongs to */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., 1 (LC), 2 (NT), 3 (VU)) */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "iucn_red_list_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the IUCN Red List for more detailed conservation data */,
  "population_trend" TEXT /* Current trend in population (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "last_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last conservation assessment */,
  "range_description" TEXT /* Description of the species' range */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Major threats to the species */,
  "conservation_actions" TEXT /* Actions being taken for conservation */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bird_species_genus_id FOREIGN KEY ("genus_id") REFERENCES genera ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bird_species_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "iucn_red_list_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the IUCN Red List for family-level data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the family */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* General conservation status of the family */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family the genus belongs to */,
  "iucn_red_list_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the IUCN Red List for genus-level data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the genus */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* General conservation status of the genus */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the genus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genera_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status (e.g., 1 (LC), 2 (NT), 3 (VU)) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for the conservation status */,
  "year_designated" INTEGER /* Year the status was designated */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation in reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "iucn_red_list_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the IUCN Red List for habitat data */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* General conservation status of the habitat */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_habitats" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id", "habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical characteristic */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the species */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the species */,
  "clutch_size" INTEGER /* Clutch size of the species */,
  "elevation_range" REAL /* Elevation range of the species */,
  "wingspan" REAL /* Wingspan of the species */,
  "beak_length" REAL /* Beak length of the species */,
  "leg_length" REAL /* Leg length of the species */,
  "feather_color" TEXT /* Color of the species' feathers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_characteristics_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES bird_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Research specialization of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the researcher's profile image */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_species" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume number of the publication */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
